name: MarkItDown MCP Server
what_it_does: MarkItDown MCP server enabling AI agents to convert documents to Markdown using Microsoft's MarkItDown library — converting PDFs, Word documents, PowerPoint presentations, Excel spreadsheets, images, and HTML to clean Markdown text suitable for LLM processing, enabling agents to ingest diverse document formats.
use_cases: Converting PDF documents to Markdown for LLM processing from document agents
Extracting text from Word/PowerPoint files for analysis from content agents
Converting Excel data to structured Markdown tables from data agents
Processing scanned documents with OCR from document ingestion agents
Building document knowledge bases from diverse file formats via RAG agents
Normalizing document formats for consistent AI processing from pipeline agents
not_for: Perfect document fidelity — MarkItDown prioritizes LLM-readable text over visual accuracy
Specialized document formats (DICOM, CAD files, etc.)
best_when: An agent needs to process diverse document formats (PDFs, Office files) as LLM-readable Markdown — MarkItDown from Microsoft provides consistent, high-quality conversion optimized for AI consumption.
avoid_when: You need perfect document rendering (use a PDF viewer) or work with highly visual/complex layouts where Markdown conversion loses critical information.

auth.notes: No authentication — local file conversion. Optional Azure Document Intelligence API key for enhanced OCR.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — local conversion; Azure AI optional
pricing.paid_tiers: Azure Document Intelligence: $0.001/page for enhanced OCR
pricing.notes: MarkItDown is free open source from Microsoft. Community MCP is free. Azure AI optional for better OCR quality.

performance.rate_limits: Local — limited by file size and conversion speed

known_agent_gotchas: Complex document layouts (tables, multi-column) may lose formatting in Markdown
Large PDFs can take several seconds to convert
MarkItDown requires various Python dependencies per format (pdfminer, python-docx, etc.)
Community MCP wrapper — MarkItDown itself is actively maintained by Microsoft
Image text extraction requires Azure Document Intelligence or local OCR setup
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local conversion. No credentials for basic use. Optional Azure for OCR. Community MCP. Document content stays local by default.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local conversion by default. Optional Azure for OCR. Community MCP. Documents stay local.
